codeReview.summary: The worker successfully wired the registration and login flows into the shell end-to-end. The ceremony in-progress state was properly added to AuthEntry and App.svelte to prevent double-submits. Extremely comprehensive Playwright integration tests (11 new tests) were added to verify all requirements of VAL-CROSS-001, VAL-CROSS-002, and VAL-CROSS-003, including checking cookie attributes, verifying the absence of tokens in web storage, ensuring no direct service ports are called, and validating that protected routes do not use bearer tokens.

summary: Review passed. Feature perfectly implements the required end-to-end register/login shell integration. Extensive Playwright tests were added to verify the contract, and UI components were correctly updated for the ceremony loading state.
